channel.title: healthTest
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from healthTest, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Serum Proteins Show Promise as Prognostic Markers in Liver Disease Progression
item.description: Research identifies distinct molecular signatures in blood and liver tissue that may track the progression of metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease.

item.title: Jennifer Aniston's Wellness Routine Brings Red Light Therapy Into Mainstream Focus
item.description: Jennifer Aniston's public endorsement of infrared saunas and red light therapy is helping transition these tools from niche biohacking into broader mainstream wellness practice.

item.title: Study Links Launch of 988 Suicide Hotline to Decline in Youth Suicide Rates
item.description: Suicide rates among teenagers and young adults declined in the two years following the launch of the 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline.

item.title: Therapy Targeting Lost Pleasure Outperforms Standard Treatment for Depression
item.description: A new study finds that addressing anhedonia more effectively relieves depression and anxiety than conventional therapeutic approaches for many patients.

item.title: Advocates Vow to Revive Assisted Dying Legislation After Parliamentary Defeat
item.description: The Terminally Ill Adults Bill ended without a House of Lords vote following procedural disputes that concluded its 18-month passage through Parliament.
